title: nepenthes × stewartii
intro: Nepenthes × stewartii, also known as the Stewart's Pitcher Plant, is a unique and carnivorous plant species that is a hybrid of Nepenthes stellata and Nepenthes mindanaoensis, native to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues. The plant's extracts have been used to create herbal preparations that aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, such as improving gut health and boosting the immune system. In addition to its medicinal uses, Nepenthes × stewartii is also used in traditional medicine, where it is often prepared as a decoction or infused in tea to harness its health benefits.
